---
title: brand font - title is `#context text.font`{=typst} `#context text.size`{=typst}
format: typst
  typst:
    font-paths:
      - .
---

## heading-2 is `#context text.font`{=typst} `#context text.size`{=typst}

paragraph is `#context text.font`{=typst} `#context text.size`{=typst}.

```{=typst}
#text(font: "Fira Code")[Some text with font set explicitly to #context text.font #context text.size]
```

```
A Quarto code block.
I can't figure out how to to introspect Typst
to find out what font this is,
but it should be fira code too.
```

{{< lipsum 5 >}}
